texto: I did study the art of being a barber because I wanted to figure out what my routine would be. Do you start in the front or back? Top or bottom? Swivel the chair or walk around? What I did discover is there's no such thing as the perfect haircut!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Sean Patrick Thomas que provoca temas ligados a educacao. Ao questionar “I did study the art of being a barber because I wanted to figure out what my routine would be. Do…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre educacao, start, walk, com foco em estudos e walk.
